infeasible_scenarios.scenario: Server-side dry-run validation with admission webhooks
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Requires live Kubernetes cluster with kubectl configured and admission webhooks installed. Cannot simulate server-side validation without actual cluster.

infeasible_scenarios.scenario: CRD version compatibility testing against cluster
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Requires live cluster with specific CRD versions installed to test version compatibility. No way to simulate CRD installation state.
